meta.title: DomeCortex AI — Know what attackers can see before they do
meta.description: An Iron Dome for your website: continuous security monitoring, a clear 0-100 security score, and AI-powered fixes explained in plain English — start free, no credit card required.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

invitationAccept.invalidDesc: It may have expired, already been used, or the link may be incorrect.
invitationAccept.signInPrompt: Sign in or create an account with {email} to accept.
invitationAccept.wrongAccountTitle: Signed in with a different email
invitationAccept.wrongAccountDesc: This invitation was sent to {email}. Sign out and sign in with that account to accept it.

landing.heroEyebrow: An Iron Dome for small business websites
landing.heroSubtitle: DomeCortex AI continuously checks your website and online accounts for weaknesses hackers could exploit, explains what's wrong in plain English, and tells you exactly what to fix — before it costs you customers or data.
landing.heroNoCreditCard: Free plan, no credit card required
landing.pulseMonitorLabel: Live monitoring — never stops watching your business
landing.scanStep3: checking if your website is actually secure...
landing.scanStep4: ⚠ CRITICAL — your website is NOT secure: hackers could steal customer data today
landing.scanStep5: checking for unlocked doors on your website...
landing.scanStep7: Security Score: 74/100 (C) — translated into plain English, ready to read
landing.previewTitle: This is the actual product — not a mockup
landing.previewSubtitle: A real security score, real findings, on a real tracked domain — every screenshot on this page is a live screen from DomeCortex AI.
landing.previewAlt: DomeCortex AI dashboard showing a security score of 78/100 (C+) for iana.org with three real findings, including a missing TLS certificate and a missing permissions-policy header
landing.spotlightReportsTitle: A report you can actually hand to your board
landing.spotlightReportsDesc: One click generates a clean, exportable PDF — score, every asset discovered, every finding with severity, and a plain-language recommendations list. Download it or email it straight to yourself.
landing.spotlightReportsAlt: A real generated DomeCortex AI PDF security report showing a score of 72/100, 6 discovered assets, and 3 findings with severity levels and recommendations
landing.spotlightAlertsTitle: See the change the moment it happens
landing.spotlightAlertsDesc: New subdomain, new IP, a certificate about to expire — every change to your online footprint lands in one feed, with an unread count that follows you around the app.
landing.spotlightAlertsAlt: A real DomeCortex AI alerts feed listing newly discovered subdomains and IP addresses for iana.org, each with a timestamp and a mark-as-read action
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to protect your business online
landing.feature1Desc: Automatically maps your subdomains, IPs, TLS certificates, and exposed services — no manual inventory required.
landing.feature2Desc: A transparent 0-100 score across SSL, headers, exposure, configuration, and asset-change categories — every point traces to a real finding.
landing.feature3Desc: Get notified the moment a new asset appears, a certificate nears expiry, or something disappears unexpectedly.
landing.feature4Desc: Plain-language explanations, business impact, and specific fixes for every finding — not just a raw technical scan output.
landing.feature5Desc: Share a polished, board-ready report with your team or auditors — download or email it directly.
landing.feature6Desc: Daily automated re-scans catch drift between manual reviews, so nothing slips through unnoticed.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Free to start — no credit card required.
landing.howItWorksTitle: From zero to a full map of your online risk in minutes
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: No agents to install, no network access to grant — just a domain name.
landing.step1Desc: Type in a domain you're responsible for. That's the entire setup — no credentials, no agents, no firewall changes.
landing.step2Title: We scan what attackers would scan
landing.step2Desc: DNS, subdomains, TLS certificates, HTTP responses, and detected technologies — the same reconnaissance an attacker does first, done automatically and safely.
landing.step3Title: Get a prioritized, explained action list
landing.step3Desc: A 0-100 score, every finding traced to its cause, and — when configured — an AI-written explanation of what to fix first and why it matters.
landing.whyNowTitle: Every business is exposed online today — most don't have a map of it
landing.whyNowBody: Domains, subdomains, and cloud assets accumulate faster than any manual inventory can track — a forgotten staging subdomain or an expired certificate is often how attackers get their first foothold, not a sophisticated exploit.
landing.whyNowStatLabel: higher average breach cost, and ~26% longer to identify, when "shadow" — unknown or forgotten — assets are involved
landing.whyNowStatSource: Source: IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report (ibm.com/reports/data-breach)
landing.smallBizEyebrow: A solution built for small and medium-sized businesses
landing.smallBizTitle: You don't need to know what a subdomain is for this to work
landing.smallBizSubtitle: Most security monitoring tools are built for enterprise security teams. DomeCortex AI is built for the small or medium-sized business that doesn't have one — whether the "security team" is you, alone, right now.
landing.smallBizPoint1Desc: Every finding is explained in plain language — what it means, why it matters, and what to do about it. Not a technical scan dump you need a specialist to translate.
landing.smallBizPoint2Desc: Type in your domain name. That's the entire setup — no software, no IT ticket, no consultant, no firewall changes.
landing.smallBizPoint3Title: Tells you what to fix first
landing.smallBizPoint3Desc: One prioritized list, not two hundred alerts. We rank what actually matters so you always know where to start.
landing.smallBizPoint4Desc: Start free. Paid plans begin at $49/month — not the five-figure annual contracts most security tools require.
landing.translationEyebrow: The same real finding, two ways
landing.translationTitle: You shouldn't need a computer science degree to understand your own website
landing.translationOtherToolsLabel: What most security tools show you
landing.translationOtherToolsText: No valid TLS certificate observed — No TLS certificate could be retrieved on port 443 — the site may be HTTP-only or unreachable over HTTPS.
landing.translationSentinelText: Your site has no working security certificate. Visitors likely see a scary warning page instead of your site, and anything they type in — passwords, card numbers — isn't protected on the way there.
landing.translationFootnote: Both are the exact same real finding from the exact same real scan — the technical wording is always still one click away, it's just no longer the first thing you have to decode.
landing.globeTitle: Everything hackers could find, in one live map
landing.globeSubtitle: Every domain, subdomain, IP, and certificate DomeCortex AI discovers becomes a node in a map that's redrawn with every scan — so you're never guessing what's actually exposed.
landing.tunnelTitle: Every second, your business is being watched — by us, not them
landing.tunnelSubtitle: Each pulse traveling down this line is a heartbeat — the same rhythm as DomeCortex AI's re-scans, running continuously in the background so a new exposure never sits unnoticed for long.
landing.trustTitle: Built the way a security tool should be
landing.trustPoint1Desc: Discovery only ever reads what's already publicly reachable (DNS, TLS, HTTP) — it never attempts to exploit, modify, or authenticate against anything.
landing.trustPoint2Desc: Every score and finding links back to the exact signal that produced it — no black-box numbers you have to just trust.
landing.trustPoint3Desc: Start free, cancel anytime from your billing settings — no sales call required to stop paying.
landing.trustPoint4Desc: Outbound scanning is checked against private/internal address ranges before every connection, so the platform itself can't be turned into a tool against internal infrastructure.
landing.faq1Q: Do I need to install anything?
landing.faq1A: No. DomeCortex AI only needs a domain name — everything it discovers is reachable the same way a browser or search engine would reach it.
landing.faq2Q: Can I scan a domain I don't own?
landing.faq2A: Only scan domains you own or are authorized to test. DomeCortex AI performs read-only, non-intrusive reconnaissance, but you're responsible for having the right to monitor any domain you add.
landing.faq3Q: What happens on the Free plan?
landing.faq3A: You get one domain, weekly scans, and full access to security scoring and findings — no credit card, no time limit.
landing.faq4A: Yes — change or cancel your plan anytime from your billing settings. No calls, no forms.
landing.faq5Q: How is the security score calculated?
landing.faq5A: It starts at 100 and deducts real, traceable points across five categories — SSL, headers, exposure, configuration, and asset changes. Every point lost links to a specific finding you can inspect.
landing.faq6Q: I'm not technical at all — is this really for me?
landing.faq6A: Yes. DomeCortex AI is built so a business owner with no security background can use it end-to-end: plain-language findings instead of jargon, a prioritized to-do list instead of a raw scan dump, and nothing to install. If you get stuck, a real person reads every message sent through the contact form.
landing.faq7Q: What do I actually do with the results?
landing.faq7A: Every finding tells you what it means and what to do about it in plain language, and — when AI analysis is configured — a specific step-by-step fix. You don't need to interpret raw technical output yourself.
landing.faq8Q: Will the alerts be full of technical terms I won't understand?
landing.faq8A: No. Every alert leads with a plain-English headline — things like "Your website is not secure" instead of technical certificate jargon — with real severity so you know what's actually urgent. The original technical wording is still there if you want it, tucked under a "show technical detail" toggle, but it's never the first thing you have to read.
landing.freeScanTitle: Try it yourself — scan your own domain, right now
landing.freeScanSubtitle: A real, live security check. No account, no credit card.
landing.freeScanErrorInvalid: Enter a valid domain name (e.g. example.com).
landing.freeScanErrorRateLimited: Too many scans from your network just now — try again in a minute.
landing.freeScanErrorDefault: Could not complete the scan. Please try again.
landing.freeScanUnreachable: We couldn't reach {domain} over the web — double-check the domain and try again.
landing.freeScanNoIssues: No obvious issues found from this quick check.
landing.freeScanCtaTitle: Sign up free to see the full report
landing.freeScanCtaDesc: Get every finding, continuous monitoring, and plain-English fixes for {domain}.
landing.freeScanDisclaimer: Only scan domains you own or are authorized to test. This is a lighter check than the full product — no subdomain discovery, no history, nothing saved.

features.title: Built for teams who need to know, not just scan
features.subtitle: DomeCortex AI goes from raw discovery to a prioritized, explained, exportable action list — automatically.
features.feature1Desc: Every scan resolves DNS (A/AAAA/CNAME/MX/TXT/NS), enumerates common subdomains, inspects the live TLS certificate on port 443, probes HTTP/HTTPS for headers and redirects, and fingerprints server/framework technology from real response signatures — then stores the result as a versioned asset, so you can see exactly what changed and when.
features.feature2Desc: A 0-100 score built from real, traceable deductions across five categories — SSL, Headers, Exposure, Configuration, and Asset Changes. No black-box model: every point lost links back to a specific finding you can inspect.
features.feature3Desc: The monitoring engine re-scans every tracked domain daily and raises an alert the moment a new asset appears, an existing one disappears, or a TLS certificate drops within 30 days of expiry — emailed directly to your organization's owners/admins for anything high-severity.
features.feature4Desc: For any finding, generate a plain-language explanation, concrete business impact, and a specific remediation step — written for the person who has to fix it, not just the person who found it.
features.feature5Desc: Generate a report for any domain covering your score, discovered assets, and findings with recommendations, download it directly, or have it emailed to you as a real attachment.
features.feature6Desc: Background workers process scans asynchronously so requesting one never blocks your dashboard — and a daily sweep keeps every tracked domain current without you having to remember to check.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more domains, faster scans, or AI-assisted remediation.
pricing.footnote: All plans start on Free — upgrade or change plans anytime from your billing settings.

free.name: Free

status.title: Status
status.subtitle: A real, live check of DomeCortex AI's own systems — not a historical uptime record.
status.footnote: This page checks the real system right now, on every load — it's not a fabricated 90-day uptime graph. If something looks wrong here for more than a few minutes, please contact us.

contact.subtitle: Questions about DomeCortex AI? Send us a message and we'll get back to you.
contact.sentMessage: Thanks — your message has been sent. We'll be in touch.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject

auth.errorDefault: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSentDesc: If an account exists for that email, a password reset link is on its way.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Make it at least 12 characters — something you haven't used before.
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been reset. You've been signed out everywhere else for safety — sign in again with your new password.
auth.invalidTokenDesc: Reset links expire after a while, or may have already been used. Request a new one below.
auth.verifyEmailSuccessDesc: Thanks — your email address is confirmed.
auth.verifyEmailErrorDesc: This verification link may have expired or already been used.
auth.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or one of your backup codes.
auth.mfaErrorDefault: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Get set up in 5 steps
onboarding.step1Desc: Done — created automatically when you signed up.
onboarding.step2Desc: Type in a domain you're responsible for. Verifying ownership is optional but recommended.
onboarding.step3Desc: This usually finishes in a few seconds.
onboarding.step4Desc: You're looking at it — your score and findings are below.
onboarding.step5Desc: You'll be emailed automatically for anything high-severity. No setup needed.

dashboard.noScanYet: No completed scan yet for {domain} — click "Scan now" to run one (usually finishes in a few seconds).
dashboard.noFindings: No findings from the latest scan — nothing to flag right now.
dashboard.footnote: Score and findings shown are for {domain} — use the selector above to view another tracked domain. There's no single combined score across domains yet. AI-generated explanations/remediation aren't wired up yet either; findings show the raw detection only.
dashboard.topRisksEmpty: No open risks right now — nice work.

domains.title: Domains
domains.subtitle: Domains DomeCortex AI monitors for this organization.

domainVerification.title: Verify domain ownership
domainVerification.instructions: Add this DNS TXT record for {domain} to prove you own it. This is optional — scanning already works without it — but a verified badge helps your team trust the data.
domainVerification.propagationNote: DNS changes can take a few minutes to appear.
domainVerification.errorDefault: Could not verify this domain yet.

reports.subtitle: Downloadable security reports for your organization.
reports.notBuiltTitle: Add a scanned domain to generate your first report
reports.notBuiltDesc: Once a domain has completed at least one scan, you'll be able to generate a board-ready PDF report here — covering your score, discovered assets, and prioritized findings.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Real-time notifications about changes to your online footprint.
alerts.emptyDesc: Alerts appear here automatically once your tracked domains have run at least one scan — a new asset, a disappearing one, or a certificate nearing expiry all raise one.

settings.title: Settings

settings.footnote: API key management isn't built yet.

settings.passwordUpdateError: Could not change your password — check your current password and try again.
settings.notificationChannelsDesc: Real-time critical alerts and digests are delivered to these in addition to email.
settings.dailyDigest: Send me a daily summary email
settings.weeklyDigest: Send me a weekly summary email
settings.notificationsSaveError: Could not save your notification settings.
settings.mfaDescription: Add an extra layer of security — after your password, you'll also need a code from an authenticator app to sign in.
settings.mfaEnabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is protecting this account. Disabling it removes that extra check at sign-in.
settings.mfaSetupInstructions: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.), then enter the 6-digit code it generates.
settings.mfaQrCodeAlt: QR code for two-factor authentication setup
settings.mfaManualEntryLabel: Can't scan it? Enter this code manually:
settings.mfaBackupCodesWarning: Save these backup codes somewhere safe — each one can be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app. They won't be shown again.
settings.mfaEnableError: That code didn't work — check your authenticator app and try again.
settings.mfaDisableError: Could not disable two-factor authentication — check your password and try again.

team.title: Team
team.onlyOwnersAdmins: Only organization owners/admins can invite new members or manage pending invitations.

activityLog.title: Activity log
activityLog.ownersAdminsOnly: Only organization owners/admins can view the activity log.

billing.title: Billing
billing.errorDefault: Could not start checkout — billing may not be configured on this deployment yet.
billing.footnote: Checkout goes through real Stripe Checkout Sessions. On a deployment without real Stripe API keys configured — like this local build — clicking "Upgrade" will show a clear error rather than a fake checkout page.
billing.cryptoErrorDefault: Could not start crypto checkout — it may not be configured on this deployment yet.
billing.cryptoFootnote: Crypto checkout is an additional payment method for your existing, logged-in organization — the charge is created for your real account (via Coinbase Commerce) exactly like a card payment, with the same audit-log entry. There is no anonymous or guest checkout option; every payment on DomeCortex AI is always tied to an identified account, whichever payment method you use.

alertCard.aiErrorDefault: Could not get an AI analysis right now.

scoreBreakdown.empty: No categories have deducted any points.

riskChart.needsMoreScans: Run a few more scans to see a trend line here — one data point per completed scan.
